mapper.select: SELECT SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD, SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE FROM DOCS_SYSTEM_CONFIG WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_GROUP = 'DB_INTERFACE_CONFIG'
SELECT PROTECT_YN FROM #{TABLE_NAME} WHERE CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL} AND OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_SW ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, SW_CLASS_CD1, SW_CLASS_NM1, SW_CLASS_CD2, SW_CLASS_NM2, SW_TYPE_CD, PRODUCT_CD, ECN_NO, ECN_INSERT_UID, SW_NO, REV_NO, SW_NM, STATUS_CD, SW_VERSION_NO, DOC_VERSION_NO, PROJECT_CD, PROJECT_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, STD_GAPP_DT, CHANGE_GAPP_DT, DESCRIPTION, SECURITY_TYPE_CD, PROTECT_YN, INSERT_DEPT_NM, INSERT_UID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_DEPT_NM, UPDATE_UID, UPDATE_DT, INTERFACE_DT, VALID_TYPE) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, #{SW_CLASS_CD1}, #{SW_CLASS_NM1}, #{SW_CLASS_CD2}, #{SW_CLASS_NM2}, #{SW_TYPE_CD}, #{PRODUCT_CD}, #{ECN_NO}, #{ECN_INSERT_UID}, #{SW_NO}, #{REV_NO}, #{SW_NM}, #{STATUS_CD}, #{SW_VERSION_NO}, #{DOC_VERSION_NO}, #{PROJECT_CD}, #{PROJECT_NM}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, #{STD_GAPP_DT}, #{CHANGE_GAPP_DT}, #{DESCRIPTION}, #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, #{PROTECT_YN}, #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, #{INSERT_UID}, #{INSERT_DT}, #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, #{UPDATE_UID}, #{UPDATE_DT}, #{INTERFACE_DT}, #{VALID_TYPE} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_SW_FILE ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO, FILE_PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NM, CHECK_SUM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_SIZE, INTERFACE_DT ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{FILE_NO}, #{FILE_PATH_NM}, #{ORG_FILE_NM}, #{FILE_NM}, #{CHECK_SUM}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, #{FILE_SIZE}, #{INTERFACE_DT} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_DRAWING ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, ECN_NO, ECN_INSERT_UID, DRAWING_TYPE, DRAWING_NO, DRAWING_REV, REV_NO, DRAWING_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, STATUS_CD, CURRENT_PAGE_NO, TOTAL_PAGE_NO, EFFECTIVE_DT, FILE_PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, STD_GAPP_DT, CHANGE_GAPP_DT, PURCHASER_UID, VENDOR_CD, DESCRIPTION, SECURITY_TYPE_CD, PROTECT_YN, INSERT_DEPT_NM, INSERT_UID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_DEPT_NM, UPDATE_UID, UPDATE_DT, INTERFACE_DT, PRODUCT_CD, PLANT_CD, PDM_PART_NO, PART_REV, INSERT_USER_NM, ECN_TITLE, ECN_VENDOR_USER, VALID_TYPE, DISTRIBUTION_YN ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, #{ECN_NO}, #{ECN_INSERT_UID}, #{DRAWING_TYPE}, #{DRAWING_NO}, #{DRAWING_REV}, #{REV_NO}, #{DRAWING_NM}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, #{STATUS_CD}, #{CURRENT_PAGE_NO}, #{TOTAL_PAGE_NO}, #{EFFECTIVE_DT}, #{FILE_PATH_NM}, #{ORG_FILE_NM}, #{FILE_NM}, #{FILE_SIZE}, #{STD_GAPP_DT}, #{CHANGE_GAPP_DT}, #{PURCHASER_UID}, #{VENDOR_CD}, #{DESCRIPTION}, #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, #{PROTECT_YN}, #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, #{INSERT_UID}, #{INSERT_DT}, #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, #{UPDATE_UID}, #{UPDATE_DT}, #{INTERFACE_DT}, #{PRODUCT_CD}, #{PLANT_CD}, #{PDM_PART_NO}, #{PART_REV}, #{INSERT_USER_NM}, #{ECN_TITLE}, #{ECN_VENDOR_USER}, #{VALID_TYPE}, #{DISTRIBUTION_YN} )
INSERT INTO DOCS_DRAWING_MEMBER ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, ACCESS_UID, INTERFACE_DT ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{ACCESS_UID}, #{INTERFACE_DT} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_DOCUMENT ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, DOC_CLASS_CD1, DOC_CLASS_NM1, DOC_CLASS_CD2, DOC_CLASS_NM2, PRODUCT_CD, ECN_NO, ECN_INSERT_UID, DOCUMENT_NO, REV_NO, DOCUMENT_NM, DOCUMENT_ENNM, ACCOUNT_NM, STATUS_CD, TOTAL_SHEET, PROJECT_CD, PROJECT_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, STD_GAPP_DT, CHANGE_GAPP_DT, SECURITY_TYPE_CD, PROTECT_YN, DESCRIPTION, INSERT_DEPT_NM, INSERT_UID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_DEPT_NM, UPDATE_UID, UPDATE_DT, INTERFACE_DT, VALID_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, #{DOC_CLASS_CD1}, #{DOC_CLASS_NM1}, #{DOC_CLASS_CD2}, #{DOC_CLASS_NM2}, #{PRODUCT_CD}, #{ECN_NO}, #{ECN_INSERT_UID}, #{DOCUMENT_NO}, #{REV_NO}, #{DOCUMENT_NM}, #{DOCUMENT_ENNM}, #{ACCOUNT_NM}, #{STATUS_CD}, #{TOTAL_SHEET}, #{PROJECT_CD}, #{PROJECT_NM}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, #{STD_GAPP_DT}, #{CHANGE_GAPP_DT}, #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, #{PROTECT_YN}, #{DESCRIPTION}, #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, #{INSERT_UID}, #{INSERT_DT}, #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, #{UPDATE_UID}, #{UPDATE_DT}, #{INTERFACE_DT}, #{VALID_TYPE} )
INSERT INTO DOCS_DOCUMENT_MEMBER ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, ACCESS_UID, INTERFACE_DT ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{ACCESS_UID}, #{INTERFACE_DT} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO, FILE_PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_SIZE, INTERFACE_DT ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{FILE_NO}, #{FILE_PATH_NM}, #{ORG_FILE_NM}, #{FILE_NM}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, #{FILE_SIZE}, #{INTERFACE_DT} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, DOC_CLASS_CD1, DOC_CLASS_NM1, DOC_CLASS_CD2, DOC_CLASS_NM2, DOCUMENT_NO, REV_NO, DOCUMENT_NM, STATUS_CD, TOTAL_PAGE_CNT, SECURITY_TYPE_CD, APPLY_PRODUCT_NO, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, APPLY_HOGI_NO, CALL_ID, ECN_NO, PROCESS_TYPE_CD, DESCRIPTION, INSERT_DEPT_NM, INSERT_UID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_DEPT_NM, UPDATE_UID, UPDATE_DT, INTERFACE_DT ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, #{DOC_CLASS_CD1}, #{DOC_CLASS_NM1}, #{DOC_CLASS_CD2}, #{DOC_CLASS_NM2}, #{DOCUMENT_NO}, #{REV_NO}, #{DOCUMENT_NM}, #{STATUS_CD}, #{TOTAL_PAGE_CNT}, #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, #{APPLY_PRODUCT_NO}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, #{APPLY_HOGI_NO}, #{CALL_ID}, #{ECN_NO}, #{PROCESS_TYPE_CD}, #{DESCRIPTION}, #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, #{INSERT_UID}, #{INSERT_DT}, #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, #{UPDATE_UID}, #{UPDATE_DT}, #{INTERFACE_DT} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO, FILE_PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_SIZE, INTERFACE_DT ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{FILE_NO}, #{FILE_PATH_NM}, #{ORG_FILE_NM}, #{FILE_NM}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, #{FILE_SIZE}, #{INTERFACE_DT} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCT_SW ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, ECN_NO, PRODUCT_NO, SW_CLASS_CD1, SW_CLASS_NM1, SW_CLASS_CD2, SW_CLASS_NM2, SW_NO, REV_NO, SW_NM, SW_VERSION_NO, STATUS_CD, DESCRIPTION, SECURITY_TYPE_CD, INSERT_DEPT_NM, INSERT_UID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_DEPT_NM, UPDATE_UID, UPDATE_DT, INTERFACE_DT, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, #{ECN_NO}, #{PRODUCT_NO}, #{SW_CLASS_CD1}, #{SW_CLASS_NM1}, #{SW_CLASS_CD2}, #{SW_CLASS_NM2}, #{SW_NO}, #{REV_NO}, #{SW_NM}, #{SW_VERSION_NO}, #{STATUS_CD}, #{DESCRIPTION}, #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, #{INSERT_UID}, #{INSERT_DT}, #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, #{UPDATE_UID}, #{UPDATE_DT}, #{INTERFACE_DT}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCT_SW_FILE ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO, FILE_PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_SIZE, CHECK_SUM, INTERFACE_DT ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{FILE_NO}, #{FILE_PATH_NM}, #{ORG_FILE_NM}, #{FILE_NM}, #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, #{FILE_SIZE}, #{CHECK_SUM}, #{INTERFACE_DT} )

INSERT INTO DOCS_ECO_HISTORY ( CN_SERIAL, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, ECN_NO, UPPER_PART_NO, UPPER_PART_REV_NO, UPPER_DRAWING_NO, UPPER_DRAWING_REV_NO, BEFORE_PART_NO, BEFORE_PART_REV_NO, BEFORE_DRAWING_NO, BEFORE_DRAWING_REV_NO, AFTER_PART_NO, AFTER_PART_REV_NO, AFTER_DRAWING_NO, AFTER_DRAWING_REV_NO, USE_TYPE_CD, ECN_INSERT_UID, ECN_APPROVAL_DT, SEQ_NO, INTERFACE_DT ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, #{ECN_NO}, #{UPPER_PART_NO}, #{UPPER_PART_REV_NO}, #{UPPER_DRAWING_NO}, #{UPPER_DRAWING_REV_NO}, #{BEFORE_PART_NO}, #{BEFORE_PART_REV_NO}, #{BEFORE_DRAWING_NO}, #{BEFORE_DRAWING_REV_NO}, #{AFTER_PART_NO}, #{AFTER_PART_REV_NO}, #{AFTER_DRAWING_NO}, #{AFTER_DRAWING_REV_NO}, #{USE_TYPE_CD}, #{ECN_INSERT_UID}, #{ECN_APPROVAL_DT}, #{SEQ_NO}, #{INTERFACE_DT} )
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_SW SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD = #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, SW_CLASS_CD1 = #{SW_CLASS_CD1}, SW_CLASS_NM1 = #{SW_CLASS_NM1}, SW_CLASS_CD2 = #{SW_CLASS_CD2}, SW_CLASS_NM2 = #{SW_CLASS_NM2}, SW_TYPE_CD = #{SW_TYPE_CD}, PRODUCT_CD = #{PRODUCT_CD}, ECN_NO = #{ECN_NO}, ECN_INSERT_UID = #{ECN_INSERT_UID}, SW_NO = #{SW_NO}, REV_NO = #{REV_NO}, SW_NM = #{SW_NM}, STATUS_CD = #{STATUS_CD}, SW_VERSION_NO = #{SW_VERSION_NO}, DOC_VERSION_NO = #{DOC_VERSION_NO}, PROJECT_CD = #{PROJECT_CD}, PROJECT_NM = #{PROJECT_NM}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, STD_GAPP_DT = #{STD_GAPP_DT}, CHANGE_GAPP_DT = #{CHANGE_GAPP_DT}, DESCRIPTION = #{DESCRIPTION}, SECURITY_TYPE_CD = #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, PROTECT_YN = #{PROTECT_YN}, INSERT_DEPT_NM = #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, INSERT_UID = #{INSERT_UID}, INSERT_DT = #{INSERT_DT}, UPDATE_DEPT_NM = #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, UPDATE_UID = #{UPDATE_UID}, UPDATE_DT = #{UPDATE_DT}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT}, VALID_TYPE = #{VALID_TYPE} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}

UPDATE DOCS_DOCUMENT SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD = #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, DOC_CLASS_CD1 = #{DOC_CLASS_CD1}, DOC_CLASS_NM1 = #{DOC_CLASS_NM1}, DOC_CLASS_CD2 = #{DOC_CLASS_CD2}, DOC_CLASS_NM2 = #{DOC_CLASS_NM2}, PRODUCT_CD = #{PRODUCT_CD}, ECN_NO = #{ECN_NO}, ECN_INSERT_UID = #{ECN_INSERT_UID}, DOCUMENT_NO = #{DOCUMENT_NO}, REV_NO = #{REV_NO}, DOCUMENT_NM = #{DOCUMENT_NM}, DOCUMENT_ENNM = #{DOCUMENT_ENNM}, ACCOUNT_NM = #{ACCOUNT_NM}, STATUS_CD = #{STATUS_CD}, TOTAL_SHEET = #{TOTAL_SHEET}, PROJECT_CD = #{PROJECT_CD}, PROJECT_NM = #{PROJECT_NM}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, STD_GAPP_DT = #{STD_GAPP_DT}, CHANGE_GAPP_DT = #{CHANGE_GAPP_DT}, SECURITY_TYPE_CD = #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, PROTECT_YN = #{PROTECT_YN}, DESCRIPTION = #{DESCRIPTION}, INSERT_DEPT_NM = #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, INSERT_UID = #{INSERT_UID}, INSERT_DT = #{INSERT_DT}, UPDATE_DEPT_NM = #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, UPDATE_UID = #{UPDATE_UID}, UPDATE_DT = #{UPDATE_DT}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT}, VALID_TYPE = #{VALID_TYPE} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}

UPDATE DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, FILE_PATH_NM = #{FILE_PATH_NM}, ORG_FILE_NM = #{ORG_FILE_NM}, FILE_NM = #{FILE_NM}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, FILE_SIZE = #{FILE_SIZE}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} and FILE_NO = #{FILE_NO}

UPDATE DOCS_DRAWING SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD = #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, ECN_NO = #{ECN_NO}, ECN_INSERT_UID = #{ECN_INSERT_UID}, DRAWING_TYPE = #{DRAWING_TYPE}, DRAWING_NO = #{DRAWING_NO}, DRAWING_REV = #{DRAWING_REV}, REV_NO = #{REV_NO}, DRAWING_NM = #{DRAWING_NM}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, STATUS_CD = #{STATUS_CD}, CURRENT_PAGE_NO = #{CURRENT_PAGE_NO}, TOTAL_PAGE_NO = #{TOTAL_PAGE_NO}, EFFECTIVE_DT = #{EFFECTIVE_DT}, FILE_PATH_NM = #{FILE_PATH_NM}, ORG_FILE_NM = #{ORG_FILE_NM}, FILE_NM = #{FILE_NM}, FILE_SIZE = #{FILE_SIZE}, STD_GAPP_DT = #{STD_GAPP_DT}, CHANGE_GAPP_DT = #{CHANGE_GAPP_DT}, PURCHASER_UID = #{PURCHASER_UID}, VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}, DESCRIPTION = #{DESCRIPTION}, SECURITY_TYPE_CD = #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, PROTECT_YN = #{PROTECT_YN}, INSERT_DEPT_NM = #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, INSERT_UID = #{INSERT_UID}, INSERT_DT = #{INSERT_DT}, UPDATE_DEPT_NM = #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, UPDATE_UID = #{UPDATE_UID}, UPDATE_DT = #{UPDATE_DT}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT}, PRODUCT_CD = #{PRODUCT_CD}, PLANT_CD = #{PLANT_CD}, PDM_PART_NO = #{PDM_PART_NO}, PART_REV = #{PART_REV}, INSERT_USER_NM = #{INSERT_USER_NM}, ECN_TITLE = #{ECN_TITLE}, ECN_VENDOR_USER = #{ECN_VENDOR_USER}, VALID_TYPE = #{VALID_TYPE} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}

UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD = #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, DOC_CLASS_CD1 = #{DOC_CLASS_CD1}, DOC_CLASS_NM1 = #{DOC_CLASS_NM1}, DOC_CLASS_CD2 = #{DOC_CLASS_CD2}, DOC_CLASS_NM2 = #{DOC_CLASS_NM2}, DOCUMENT_NO = #{DOCUMENT_NO}, REV_NO = #{REV_NO}, DOCUMENT_NM = #{DOCUMENT_NM}, STATUS_CD = #{STATUS_CD}, TOTAL_PAGE_CNT = #{TOTAL_PAGE_CNT}, SECURITY_TYPE_CD = #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, APPLY_PRODUCT_NO = #{APPLY_PRODUCT_NO}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, APPLY_HOGI_NO = #{APPLY_HOGI_NO}, CALL_ID = #{CALL_ID}, ECN_NO = #{ECN_NO}, PROCESS_TYPE_CD = #{PROCESS_TYPE_CD}, DESCRIPTION = #{DESCRIPTION}, INSERT_DEPT_NM = #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, INSERT_UID = #{INSERT_UID}, INSERT_DT = #{INSERT_DT}, UPDATE_DEPT_NM = #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, UPDATE_UID = #{UPDATE_UID}, UPDATE_DT = #{UPDATE_DT}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}

UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, FILE_PATH_NM = #{FILE_PATH_NM}, ORG_FILE_NM = #{ORG_FILE_NM}, FILE_NM = #{FILE_NM}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, FILE_SIZE = #{FILE_SIZE}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} AND FILE_NO = #{FILE_NO}

UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_SW SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD = #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, ECN_NO = #{ECN_NO}, PRODUCT_NO = #{PRODUCT_NO}, SW_CLASS_CD1 = #{SW_CLASS_CD1}, SW_CLASS_NM1 = #{SW_CLASS_NM1}, SW_CLASS_CD2 = #{SW_CLASS_CD2}, SW_CLASS_NM2 = #{SW_CLASS_NM2}, SW_NO = #{SW_NO}, REV_NO = #{REV_NO}, SW_NM = #{SW_NM}, SW_VERSION_NO = #{SW_VERSION_NO}, STATUS_CD = #{STATUS_CD}, DESCRIPTION = #{DESCRIPTION}, SECURITY_TYPE_CD = #{SECURITY_TYPE_CD}, INSERT_DEPT_NM = #{INSERT_DEPT_NM}, INSERT_UID = #{INSERT_UID}, INSERT_DT = #{INSERT_DT}, UPDATE_DEPT_NM = #{UPDATE_DEPT_NM}, UPDATE_UID = #{UPDATE_UID}, UPDATE_DT = #{UPDATE_DT}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}

UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_SW_FILE SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, FILE_PATH_NM = #{FILE_PATH_NM}, ORG_FILE_NM = #{ORG_FILE_NM}, FILE_NM = #{FILE_NM}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, FILE_SIZE = #{FILE_SIZE}, CHECK_SUM = #{CHECK_SUM}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} AND FILE_NO = #{FILE_NO}

UPDATE DOCS_SW_FILE SET CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL}, FILE_PATH_NM = #{FILE_PATH_NM}, ORG_FILE_NM = #{ORG_FILE_NM}, FILE_NM = #{FILE_NM}, CHECK_SUM = #{CHECK_SUM}, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD}, FILE_SIZE = #{FILE_SIZE}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT} WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} AND FILE_NO = #{FILE_NO}

UPDATE DOCS_ECO_HISTORY SET BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD}, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD = #{BUSINESS_TYPE_CD}, UPPER_PART_NO = #{UPPER_PART_NO}, UPPER_PART_REV_NO = #{UPPER_PART_REV_NO}, UPPER_DRAWING_NO = #{UPPER_DRAWING_NO}, UPPER_DRAWING_REV_NO = #{UPPER_DRAWING_REV_NO}, BEFORE_PART_NO = #{BEFORE_PART_NO}, BEFORE_PART_REV_NO = #{BEFORE_PART_REV_NO}, BEFORE_DRAWING_NO = #{BEFORE_DRAWING_NO}, BEFORE_DRAWING_REV_NO = #{BEFORE_DRAWING_REV_NO}, AFTER_PART_NO = #{AFTER_PART_NO}, AFTER_PART_REV_NO = #{AFTER_PART_REV_NO}, AFTER_DRAWING_NO = #{AFTER_DRAWING_NO}, AFTER_DRAWING_REV_NO = #{AFTER_DRAWING_REV_NO}, USE_TYPE_CD = #{USE_TYPE_CD}, ECN_INSERT_UID = #{ECN_INSERT_UID}, ECN_APPROVAL_DT = #{ECN_APPROVAL_DT}, INTERFACE_DT = #{INTERFACE_DT} WHERE 1= 1 AND CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL} AND ECN_NO = #{ECN_NO} AND SEQ_NO = #{SEQ_NO}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM DOCS_SW_MEMBER WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} AND ACCESS_UID = #{ACCESS_UID}
DELETE FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_MEMBER WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} AND ACCESS_UID = #{ACCESS_UID}
DELETE FROM DOCS_DRAWING_MEMBER WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} AND ACCESS_UID = #{ACCESS_UID}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM NOT_COMPLETED_CN_SERIAL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM NOT_COMPLETED_CN_SERIAL WHERE CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL} AND OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} AND TABLE_NAME = #{TABLE_NAME}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOT_COMPLETED_CN_SERIAL ( CN_SERIAL, OBJECT_ID, TABLE_NAME, ERROR ) VALUES ( #{CN_SERIAL}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{TABLE_NAME}, #{ERROR} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NOT_COMPLETED_CN_SERIAL WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} AND CN_SERIAL = #{CN_SERIAL} AND TABLE_NAME = #{TABLE_NAME}
mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY_CD FROM DOCS_COMPANY WHERE BIZ_NO = #{VENDOR_CD} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD')||'-'||#{objectTypeCode}||LPAD(NVL(SUBSTR(MAX(REQUEST_NO),11),0)+1,4,0) AS REQUEST_NO FROM DOCS_REQUEST WHERE SUBSTR(REQUEST_NO,1,10) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD')||'-'||#{objectTypeCode}
INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST ( REQUEST_NO , REQUEST_TYPE , REQUEST_PURPOSE , APPROVAL_LINE_ID , CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO , DEPLOY_COMPANY_CD , PRINT_YN , DEPLOY_NORMAL_YN , DEPLOY_SPECIAL_YN , INSERT_USER_CD , INSERT_DT , UPDATE_USER_CD , UPDATE_DT , STATUS_CD , OBJECT_TYPE , BUSINESS_AREA_CD , PROTECT_YN ) VALUES ( #{REQUEST_NO} , 'DISTRIBUTION' /* 요청유형 : 무조건 배포 */ , 'PRODUCT' /* 용도 : 무조건 제조용 */ , #{APPROVAL_LINE_ID} , '2' , #{DEPLOY_COMPANY_CD} , 'Y' /* 출력가능여부 */ , 'N' /* 일반영역 다운로드 가능 여부*/ , 'N' /* 보안영역 다운로드 가능 여부 */ , #{DEPLOY_USER_CD} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , #{DEPLOY_USER_CD} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , 'REQUEST' , #{OBJECT_TYPE} , #{BUSINESS_AREA_CD} , #{PROTECT_YN} )
mapper.select:
SELECT USER_CD , EMAIL FROM ( SELECT USER_CD , EMAIL FROM DOCS_USER u INNER JOIN DOCS_COMPANY c ON c.COMPANY_CD = u.COMPANY_CD WHERE BIZ_NO = #{VENDOR_CD} AND DISTRIBUTION_PERSON_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT USER_CD , EMAIL FROM DOCS_USER u INNER JOIN DOCS_COMPANY c ON c.COMPANY_CD = u.COMPANY_CD WHERE BIZ_NO = #{VENDOR_CD} ) LIMIT 1

SELECT USER_CD , EMAIL FROM ( SELECT USER_CD , EMAIL FROM DOCS_USER u INNER JOIN DOCS_COMPANY c ON c.COMPANY_CD = u.COMPANY_CD WHERE BIZ_NO = #{VENDOR_CD} AND DISTRIBUTION_PERSON_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT USER_CD , EMAIL FROM DOCS_USER u INNER JOIN DOCS_COMPANY c ON c.COMPANY_CD = u.COMPANY_CD WHERE BIZ_NO = #{VENDOR_CD} ) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL ( REQUEST_NO , PROCESS_SEQ , APPROVAL_STATUS_CD , ORIGINAL_USER_CD , ACTUAL_USER_CD , REQUEST_DESC , ACTION_DT , ACTION_CD , APPROVAL_GRADE_CD ) SELECT #{REQUEST_NO} AS REQUEST_NO , PROCESS_SEQ_NO AS PROCESS_SEQ , APPROVAL_STATUS_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN #{DEPLOY_USER_CD} WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT' THEN #{ACCEPTANCE_USER_CD} ELSE '' END AS ORIGINAL_USER_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN #{DEPLOY_USER_CD} WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT' THEN #{ACCEPTANCE_USER_CD} ELSE '' END AS ACTUAL_USER_CD , '긴급도 자동 요청' AS REQUEST_DESC , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END AS ACTION_DT , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN 'REQUEST' ELSE NULL END AS ACTION_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_LINE_ID = 1 AND PROCESS_SEQ_NO = 3 THEN 'TL' WHEN APPROVAL_LINE_ID = 1 AND PROCESS_SEQ_NO = 4 THEN 'DEF' WHEN APPROVAL_LINE_ID = 2 AND PROCESS_SEQ_NO = 3 THEN 'TL' ELSE '' END AS APPROVAL_GRADE_CD FROM DOCS_APPROVAL_LINE_DETAIL WHERE APPROVAL_LINE_ID = #{APPROVAL_LINE_ID}
